candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; appears as the first revenue row and is populated.
Possible alternate revenue label, but preview is empty and less preferred than the main Revenue row.
Also a valid revenue total and matches the Revenue values; useful as fallback if label changes over time.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Value addition/gains on sales of financial instruments
candidates.why: Financial gains, not revenue from operations.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not top-line revenue.
Balance sheet item, not reported revenue line.
Liability/deferred income, not revenue line.
Equity reserve item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, with the main operating line first and the matching total as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct project/service delivery cost and a strong COGS component for a construction company.
Direct materials consumed; classic COGS component.

variables.notes: Selected direct cost components rather than any subtotal.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component.
Could be personnel-related overhead, but appears empty and less central than Personnel expenses.
Broad overhead bucket; appropriate when no explicit SG&A line exists.
Balance sheet item, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present. Chose the best operating overhead buckets and excluded COGS and D&A rows. Did not add Stock-Based Compensation because the selected overhead buckets likely already capture it, avoiding double counting.
No dedicated research and development row appears on the income statement.

candidates.why: One instance is a blank/alternate label; another is a total finance-cost line. Less preferred than underlying recurring components.
Direct interest expense component.
Recurring financing cost related to lease liabilities; should be included.
Recurring finance-cost bucket; include when using granular finance components.
Small residual finance-cost item, but less clearly recurring.
Not a finance cost.
Not a finance cost.
Good label semantically, but preview is empty while Interest Expenses is populated.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; do not use with Interest costs leases to avoid double counting.
Balance sheet equity item, not finance cost.
Balance sheet equity item, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Preferred recurring granular finance-cost components over the total Financial costs row. Excluded FX losses and impairments as non-interest/non-recurring valuation items; excluded supplemental lease-interest line to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet equity.
Equity component only, not total owner equity.
Component/alternate label, not clearly total equity attributable to owners.
Best owner-equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests; numerically Total Equity plus Non-controlling interests equals Total equity.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; less preferred because BE should exclude MIB.

variables.notes: Selected owner equity excluding non-controlling interests, consistent with the rule that BE + MIB should reconstruct total equity.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest line.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful as fallback if naming changes.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; they represent the minority-interest equity component.
